name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_utbl_jobs_allcontract
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport' AS schema_name,
  'utbl_jobs_allcontract' AS table_name,
  'MANAGED' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CreatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CreatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ScheduledStart` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ScheduledStart` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ScheduledEnd` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ScheduledEnd` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CompletedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CompletedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ApprovalDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ApprovalDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`AssignedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`AssignedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CompletedStatus` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CompletedStatus` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CompletedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CompletedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`MadeSafeDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`MadeSafeDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ComplianceCalculationDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ComplianceCalculationDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MAX(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CRMField6` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CRMField6` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`DeltaUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ModifiedUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ModifiedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CreatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`CreatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CreatedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`DueDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ScheduledStart` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`ScheduledStart` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ScheduledStart` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ScheduledEnd` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`ScheduledEnd` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ScheduledEnd` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CompletedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`CompletedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CompletedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ApprovalDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`ApprovalDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ApprovalDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`AssignedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`AssignedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`AssignedDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CompletedStatus` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`CompletedStatus` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CompletedStatus` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`CreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CreatedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CompletedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`CompletedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CompletedUser` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`MadeSafeDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`MadeSafeDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`MadeSafeDateUTC` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`ComplianceCalculationDate` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`ComplianceCalculationDate` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`ComplianceCalculationDate` AS TIMESTAMP) END), MIN(CASE WHEN try_cast(`CRMField6` AS TIMESTAMP) >= TIMESTAMP '1900-01-01 00:00:00' AND try_cast(`CRMField6` AS TIMESTAMP) <= current_timestamp() + INTERVAL 1 DAY THEN try_cast(`CRMField6` AS TIMESTAMP) END)) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'DeltaUTC|ModifiedUTC|ModifiedUser|CreatedDate|DueDate|ScheduledStart|ScheduledEnd|CompletedDate|ApprovalDate|AssignedDate|CompletedStatus|CreatedUser|CompletedUser|MadeSafeDateUTC|ComplianceCalculationDate|CRMField6' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport`.`utbl_jobs_allcontract`
